title: Memory-Free Generative Replay For Class-Incremental Learning

framework.training_process: train generator first, then train new task classifier using mixed new and generated old task images

generator_properties: matching BN statistics of old classifier
low domain gap with new task data
classifier_training: uses mixed mini-batches of new task images and generated old task images

visualizations.purpose: cartoon illustration of catastrophic forgetting on fine-grained old classes
shows the framework with knowledge recording and inheritance stages
